version_description: This version is complete with chords and lyrics and includes the full chords for the bridge section.

versions.version_description: Full lyrics with chords optimized for keyboard. For letter size printing, use -1 font size in UG print dialog.
Tried to write a chords version that has the proper arrangement noted, proper metadata, chord inversions, etc.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]

[ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]   x2
[ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
The power of love is a curious thing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
Make a one man weep, make another man sing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Change a heart to a little white dove[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
More than a feeling, that's the power of love[/tab]

[ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Tougher than diamonds, rich like cream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Stronger and harder than a bad girls dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Make a bad one good, mmm make a wrong right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Power of love will keep you home at night[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
       Don't need money,         don't take fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
       Don't need no credit card to ride this train[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
       It's strong and it's sudden and it's cruel sometimes[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Gsus4[/ch]
       But it might just save your life[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
       That's the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
       That's the power of love[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
First time you feel it might make you sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
Next time you feel it might make you mad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
But you'll be glad baby when you've found[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
That's the power that makes the world go round[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
       Don't need money,         don't take fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
       Don't need no credit card to ride this train[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
       It's strong and it's sudden and it's cruel sometimes[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Gsus4[/ch]
       But it might just save your life[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]G7/D[/ch]           [ch]Cm9[/ch]
    They say that all in love is fair[/tab]
[tab][ch]F7+9[/ch]
Yeah but you don't care[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]
   But you know what to do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]
   When it gets hold of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Gsus4[/ch]
   And with a little help from above[/tab]


[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
       That's the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
       That's the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
                HEY![/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
      Can you feel it?![/tab]


[Solo]
[ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]   x16


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
